skillPriority.info: Astra Yao's Core Skill provides a large damage increase and is recommended to be leveled up first!
Astra Yao's Basic, Dodge and Assist aren't as important or as needed since majority of the time you will be in the Idyllic Cadenza state.
Astra Yao's buff comes from this Special Attack and is her main source of damage as well. Strongly recommended to upgrade this first.
Astra Yao's Ultimate is strongly recommended to upgrade second as it provides more healing and damage/daze dealt.
Astra Yao's Basic, Dodge and Assist aren't as important or as needed since majority of the time you will be in the Idyllic Cadenza state.

Miyabi's Core Skill is integral to her core gameplay and highly recommended to level up!
Miyabi's Basic Attack is part of her core gameplay and strongest part of her kit, strongly recommend leveling this first. Basic Attack: Shimotsuki does an obscene amounts of damage!
Miyabi's Special is recommended to upgrade as her special is used frequently with high damage multipliers.
Miyabi's Chain Attack and Ultimate is strongly recommended to upgrade as she has a very high damage multiplier!
Miyabi's Assist and Dodge aren't as important as her other abilities but still can be upgraded for more damage.

Evelyn's Basic Attack is her consistent way of doing damage as well using her Garrote attacks, would recommend upgrading for higher damage multipliers.
Evelyn's Special Attack is recommended to upgrade as Evelyn is able to cancel her special attack and weave it with her basic attacks for higher damage multiplier.
Evelyn's Chain Attack and Ultimate are strongly recommended to upgrade first as her core skill revolves around chain attacks for higher damage multipliers.
Evelyn's Assist is recommended to upgrade second to last.
Evelyn's Dodge is recommended to upgrade second to last.
